sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43806" key="eu)epi/blhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐεπί-βλητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43806.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily grasped</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in de An.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:259:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">259.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
